Contents

  • Question
  • Approach
  • Code

Missing Number

Approach

Any solution that checks the sum of two lists or compares the number in two lists should work.

Code


    
from typing import List
class Solution:
    def missingNumber(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(nums)
        return (n*(n+1))//2 - sum(nums)
    
class Solution:
    def missingNumber(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        expected_nums = list(range(len(nums) + 1))
        ans = expected_nums[0]

        for num in expected_nums[1:]:
            ans ^= num

        for num in nums:
            ans ^= num

        return ans

Main Ideas

  • If the result is after the same opeartion on all elements of the list, there might be a formula to solve it which reduces one part of the problem to O(1).
  • Since counting can also use dictionary.
  • Can use XOR to remove duplicate elements.
